title: Migrate scoped validation and plan-content to templates
description:
Move the scoped-validation boundary and plan-content resolution onto the template registry.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] CFGA-01: scoped validation still halts at the breakdown node, with the boundary derived from the template.
- [ ] [hard] CFGA-02: plan-content resolution derives breakable types and doc location from the template.
